summary: The diff implements fixes for non-functional buttons across the site as required by REQ-1. Navigation smooth-scroll links, HeroSection CTA, WelcomePopup enter button, section CTA buttons (AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, GSTServicesSection), ComingSoonSection notify buttons, SubsidiaryGrid card/Discover buttons, and SubsidiaryDetails close/navigation buttons all have explicit onClick handlers wired up. The Footer 'Connect with Us' buttons are not modified. No SubsidiaryGrid is rendered in App.tsx, which may affect the SubsidiaryGrid/SubsidiaryDetails acceptance criterion, but the components themselves are implemented correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Opening SubsidiaryDetails from SubsidiaryGrid works correctly — SubsidiaryGrid must be rendered in the app for users to access it.
missing_requirements.reason: App.tsx does not render SubsidiaryGrid in the component tree. The file-summaries note explicitly states 'no SubsidiaryGrid to avoid duplicate section IDs', meaning users cannot open SubsidiaryDetails from SubsidiaryGrid at runtime, making this acceptance criterion unverifiable in practice.
